title: DFSCoerce MS-DFSNM Authentication Coercion
description: Detects DFSCoerce, which abuses the MS-DFSNM (NetrDfsRemoveStdRoot / NetrDfsAddStdRoot) interface to coerce a Domain Controller into authenticating to an attacker-controlled host for NTLM relay.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*dfscoerce*' or 'Command Line' like '*NetrDfsRemoveStdRoot*' or 'Command Line' like '*NetrDfsAddStdRoot*' or 'Command Line' like '*MS-DFSNM*')))
